ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_assessment: High quality, text-based PDF with clear fields and legible content.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_assessment: High quality, text-based PDF with clear fields and legible content.

document_pairing.method: Certificate references Order 506536; invoice has ORDER NO 506536 and REFERENCE NO 506536. Consignor matches invoice issuer. Consignee matches invoice customer.
document_pairing.sanity_check_details: Criterion 1: Certificate references order 506536, invoice ORDER NO is 506536 — partial match (invoice number is 506536-3, a derivative). Criterion 2: Consignor Fortex International AB is the invoice issuer. Criterion 3: Consignee Odil Parer LLC matches invoice CUSTOMER and CONSIGNED TO. All three criteria satisfied.

locations_found: Invoice header/branding: 'Fortex International AB' in company logo area and address block at top of page 1
Invoice issuer address block: 'Fortex International AB, Vallgatan 22, 411 16 Gothenburg, Sweden'
Beneficiary line: 'Beneficiary: Fortex International AB, Gothenburg, Sweden'

rule_activation.lc_verification_note: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number SEG-26D-464979 does not contain an LC bank term reference.

consignor.certificate_value: Fortex International AB, Vallgatan 22, 41116, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Fortex International AB, Vallgatan 22, 411 16 Gothenburg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Fortex International AB' in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND - Consignor name 'Fortex International AB' found exactly in invoice header/company name, address block, beneficiary line, and certification line.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignor name with invoice issuer name.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 'Fortex International AB' (certificate) matches 'Fortex International AB' (invoice) exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Compare consignor country. Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'Sweden' (in address block). Also confirmed by VAT prefix SE in SE556800788301.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Country Sweden verified in both documents.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure - consignor name found in invoice header/address block
Country verified via explicit address and VAT prefix SE
Country match - Sweden in both documents

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Fortex International AB' at 'Vallgatan 22, 41116, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice issuer is 'Fortex International AB' at 'Vallgatan 22, 411 16 Gothenburg, Sweden'. Name matches exactly. Address: Vallgatan 22 matches exactly. Postcode 41116 vs 411 16 is a formatting difference (space). GÖTEBORG vs Gothenburg are the Swedish and English names for the same city — this is a minor formatting variation. Country Sweden matches explicitly. VAT SE556800788301 confirms Sweden. Result: MATCH.
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Fortex International AB' is identical in certificate and invoice. Address matches (Vallgatan 22, Gothenburg/Göteborg). Country Sweden confirmed both by explicit address text and by VAT prefix SE. MATCH per rules 4.1.0, 4.1.2, 4.1.4.

consignee.certificate_value: Odil Parer LLC, 100161, Tashkent City, Chilanzar District, Chorbok Street 6, INN: 302686363, Tashkent, Uzbekistan
consignee.invoice_value: ODIL PARER LLC, 100161, Tashkent city, Chilanzar district, Chorbok street, 6, Tashkent, Uzbekistan, Company INN 302686363

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has CUSTOMER field (primary billing field) with 'ODIL PARER LLC' and CONSIGNED TO field with 'ODIL PARER LLC'. Both match certificate consignee.
comparison_steps.result: Primary billing field CUSTOMER contains the consignee name.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name 'Odil Parer LLC' with invoice CUSTOMER 'ODIL PARER LLC'.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Names identical after case normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignee country: Uzbekistan. Invoice CUSTOMER address: Tashkent, Uzbekistan.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Country Uzbekistan confirmed in both documents.

rules_applied.description: Priority order - CUSTOMER is primary billing field
Country match - Uzbekistan in both documents

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Odil Parer LLC' at Tashkent, Uzbekistan with INN 302686363. Invoice CUSTOMER: 'ODIL PARER LLC' at 100161, Tashkent city, Chilanzar district, Chorbok street, 6, Tashkent, Uzbekistan, Company INN 302686363. Also CONSIGNED TO: 'ODIL PARER LLC' with same address. Name matches exactly after case normalization. INN 302686363 matches. Address details match (100161, Tashkent city, Chilanzar district, Chorbok street 6). Country Uzbekistan matches. Result: MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Odil Parer LLC' found as 'ODIL PARER LLC' in invoice CUSTOMER and CONSIGNED TO fields. Name identical after case normalization. INN 302686363 matches. Address and country (Uzbekistan) match. MATCH per rules 4.2.0.2, 4.2.2, 4.2.3.

goods_description.certificate_value: 69 Reels of Coated White Top Testliner - SAICA IC, HS Code: 4810923000
goods_description.invoice_value: 69 Reels: Coated White Top Testliner SAICA IC, HS CODE: 4810923000

comparison_steps.description: No distinct article numbers present in certificate. HS code is present but is a customs tariff code, not an article number. Proceed to Priority 2.
comparison_steps.result: Not applicable - no article numbers in certificate.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation. Certificate: 'Coated White Top Testliner - SAICA IC'. Invoice: 'Coated White Top Testliner SAICA IC'. Compare.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Identity-bearing main designation 'Coated White Top Testliner SAICA IC' found in both documents after normalization of punctuation (dash vs colon/space).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate has '69 Reels of' as prefix and 'HS Code: 4810923000'. Invoice has '69 Reels:' as prefix, 'Subs 125gsm & 135gsm, RW 600mm - 1050mm, PO# 506536' as additional specification, and HS CODE: 4810923000. Additional specifications in invoice are non-identity-bearing and do not change product identity.
comparison_steps.result: Additional specifications do not affect MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate HS Code: 4810923000. Invoice HS CODE: 4810923000.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation identified and matched
Non-identity-bearing additions (specifications, HS code) do not affect match

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: '69 Reels of Coated White Top Testliner - SAICA IC, HS Code: 4810923000'. Invoice goods: '69 Reels: Coated White Top Testliner SAICA IC, Subs 125gsm & 135gsm, RW 600mm - 1050mm, PO# 506536, HS CODE: 4810923000'. Identity-bearing main designation is 'Coated White Top Testliner SAICA IC'. This text is found in both documents. The dash '-' in certificate vs absence in invoice between 'Testliner' and 'SAICA IC' is a minor punctuation difference (certificate uses ' - ' while invoice uses ' '). HS code 4810923000 matches exactly. Quantity prefix '69 Reels' matches. Additional specifications in invoice (Subs, RW, PO#) are non-identity-bearing per 4.3.4. Result: MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: Identity-bearing main designation 'Coated White Top Testliner SAICA IC' is identifiable in both certificate and invoice. HS code 4810923000 matches exactly. Minor punctuation difference (dash vs space) between 'Testliner - SAICA IC' and 'Testliner SAICA IC' is within allowed normalization. Additional specifications in invoice are non-identity-bearing. MATCH per rules 4.3.3 and 4.3.4.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 states 'Gross 65.132MT'. Numeric value: 65.132. Unit: MT. Weight category: Gross. All required elements present.
comparison_steps.result: Requirements met - numeric value, unit, and weight category all present.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 has one quantity: 'Gross 65.132MT'. Box 6 mentions '69 Reels' but this is a count of packages, not the box 7 verifying quantity. Box 7 value is the verification-grounding quantity.
comparison_steps.result: Box 7 value 'Gross 65.132MT' is the verification-grounding quantity.

comparison_steps.description: Search for numeric value 65.132 in invoice. Found in: '65.132 MT AT USD 740.00/MT' and 'Total Weight Quantity: 65.132 MT'.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Numeric value 65.132 found in invoice Total Weight Quantity field with unit MT.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: Gross 65.132 MT. Invoice: Total Weight Quantity: 65.132 MT. Numeric value 65.132 matches exactly. Unit MT matches exactly.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Weight value and unit match exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate specifies 'Gross'. Invoice states 'Total Weight Quantity' without explicit GW/NW. Per rule 4.4.4, difference in weight category naming does not in itself cause MISMATCH when numeric value and unit match. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 3, invoice does not contain a contradictory alternative weight value of another category.
comparison_steps.result: No contradictory weight value found. Per 4.4.4 naming difference alone does not cause MISMATCH.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check - numeric value 65.132 found in invoice
Quantity requirement - numeric value, unit MT, and weight category Gross all present in certificate
Total weight verification - numeric value and unit match
Weight category - no contradictory alternative weight value in invoice

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states 'Gross 65.132MT'. Numeric value: 65.132. Unit: MT. Category: Gross. Invoice states 'Total Weight Quantity: 65.132 MT' and also '65.132 MT AT USD 740.00/MT'. The numeric value 65.132 is explicitly found in the invoice with unit MT. Invoice uses 'Total Weight Quantity' without explicit Gross/Net label. However, per rule 4.4.4, difference in weight category naming does not in itself cause MISMATCH. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2, the invoice has only one weight value (65.132 MT), no conflicting NW value exists. No contradictory alternative weight value found. Result: MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity 'Gross 65.132MT' verified against invoice 'Total Weight Quantity: 65.132 MT'. Numeric value 65.132 and unit MT match exactly. No contradictory weight value in invoice. MATCH per rules 4.4.1, 4.4.4, 4.4.2.2.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin in invoice. Found: 'Country of Origin: EU (Spain)' in dedicated origin field.
comparison_steps.result: Origin field found in invoice with value 'EU (Spain)'.
MATCH - Origin text identical in both documents.

comparison_steps.description: Spain is an EU member state. Certificate states 'EU (Spain)'. Invoice states 'EU (Spain)'. Both EU collective designation and specific member state Spain are confirmed in both documents.
comparison_steps.result: Verified - EU origin with Spain specification confirmed in both documents.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in explicit Country of Origin field in invoice
Normalization - exact text match, no normalization needed
EU normalization - Spain is EU member state, confirmed

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'EU (Spain)'. Invoice has dedicated field 'Country of Origin: EU (Spain)'. The text is identical in both documents. Spain is an EU member state. No discrepancy. No additional origins in invoice that contradict the certificate. Result: MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Country of origin 'EU (Spain)' is identical in certificate box 3 and invoice Country of Origin field. Spain is a confirmed EU member state. Exact textual match with no normalization needed. MATCH per rules 4.5.1, 4.5.4.

evidence_records.location: Header address block + VAT prefix SE

evidence_records.raw_text:
69 Reels of Coated White Top Testliner - SAICA IC
HS Code: 4810923000

69 Reels: Coated White Top Testliner SAICA IC
Subs 125gsm & 135gsm, RW 600mm - 1050mm, PO# 506536

rule_evaluation_log.details: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-26D-464979 does not contain LC bank term. No field labeled 'L/C No.' or similar.
Document A is certificate (Certificate of Origin with ICC stamp). Document B is invoice (Commercial Invoice). Certificate references Order 506536, invoice ORDER NO is 506536.

Criterion 1: Certificate order ref 506536 matches invoice ORDER NO 506536. Criterion 2: Consignor Fortex International AB is invoice issuer. Criterion 3: Consignee Odil Parer LLC is invoice CUSTOMER. All criteria met.
Consignor 'Fortex International AB' found exactly in invoice header, address block, beneficiary line, and certification line.
Exact name match: 'Fortex International AB' in both documents.
Sweden in both documents. Also confirmed by VAT prefix SE.
CUSTOMER field (primary billing) contains 'ODIL PARER LLC'. Used as authoritative consignee.
'Odil Parer LLC' matches 'ODIL PARER LLC' after case normalization.
Identity-bearing main designation 'Coated White Top Testliner SAICA IC' found in both documents. HS code 4810923000 matches.
Additional specifications in invoice (Subs, RW, PO#) are non-identity-bearing and do not affect match.
Numeric value 65.132 found in invoice with unit MT.
Box 7 contains 'Gross 65.132MT' — this is the verification-grounding quantity.
65.132 MT matches Total Weight Quantity: 65.132 MT. Naming difference (Gross vs Total Weight Quantity) not a cause for MISMATCH per 4.4.4.
Certificate specifies Gross. Invoice has only one weight value (65.132 MT) without explicit category. No contradictory alternative value exists. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2, MATCH.
Dedicated field 'Country of Origin: EU (Spain)' in invoice.
Exact text match 'EU (Spain)' in both documents.
Spain is EU member state. EU origin confirmed in both documents.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändare (Fortex International AB, Sverige), mottagare (Odil Parer LLC, Uzbekistan), varubeskrivning (Coated White Top Testliner SAICA IC), mängd (65,132 MT brutto) och ursprungsland (EU/Spanien) matchar samtliga. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor Fortex International AB (Sweden) matches invoice issuer exactly. Consignee Odil Parer LLC (Uzbekistan) matches invoice CUSTOMER exactly. Goods description 'Coated White Top Testliner SAICA IC' with HS code 4810923000 matches. Quantity Gross 65.132 MT matches invoice Total Weight Quantity. Country of Origin EU (Spain) matches exactly.

consistency_check.details: All 5 applicable checkpoints have status MATCH. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW found. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Fortex International AB' är identiskt i certifikat och faktura. Adress Vallgatan 22 matchar. Land Sverige bekräftat via adressblock och VAT-prefix SE.

sections.certificate_value: Odil Parer LLC, 100161, Tashkent City, Chilanzar District, Chorbok Street 6, INN: 302686363, Tashkent, Uzbekistan
sections.invoice_value: ODIL PARER LLC, 100161, Tashkent city, Chilanzar district, Chorbok street, 6, Tashkent, Uzbekistan, Company INN 302686363
sections.rule_applied: Namnmatchning mot primärt faktureringsfält (CUSTOMER) med landverifiering
sections.motivation: Mottagarnamnet 'Odil Parer LLC' matchar 'ODIL PARER LLC' i fakturans CUSTOMER-fält efter versal-normalisering. INN 302686363 överensstämmer. Land Uzbekistan bekräftat.

sections.certificate_value: 69 Reels of Coated White Top Testliner - SAICA IC, HS Code: 4810923000
sections.invoice_value: 69 Reels: Coated White Top Testliner SAICA IC, Subs 125gsm & 135gsm, RW 600mm - 1050mm, PO# 506536, HS CODE: 4810923000
sections.motivation: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Coated White Top Testliner SAICA IC' identifierad i båda dokumenten. HS-kod 4810923000 matchar exakt. Ytterligare specifikationer i fakturan (substansvikt, rullbredd) är icke-identitetsbärande tillägg.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll av numeriskt värde med enhetsverifiering
sections.motivation: Numeriskt värde 65.132 och enhet MT identifierade exakt i fakturans Total Weight Quantity-fält. Certifikatet anger 'Gross', fakturan anger 'Total Weight Quantity' utan explicit GW/NW — ingen motstridig alternativ viktuppgift finns i fakturan.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt textmatchning av ursprungsland i dedikerat fält
sections.motivation: Ursprungsland 'EU (Spain)' är identiskt i certifikatets ruta 3 och fakturans Country of Origin-fält. Spanien är EU-medlemsstat. Exakt textmatchning utan normalisering.
